expectations.text: networking.md file was written to outputs directory
expectations.evidence: networking.md mevcut (7.2 KB) — Mermaid diyagram, subnet tablosu, traffic policy, /etc/network/interfaces config, doğrulama komutları, rollback içeriyor

expectations.text: A bash setup script was generated
Setup script uses set -euo pipefail for safety
Output includes DROP or REJECT rules for the isolated subnet 10.0.2.0/24
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: 'FORWARD DROP for virbr2 -> eth0 and eth0 -> virbr2 (full isolation)' ve 'FORWARD DROP between virbr1 and virbr2'
Script ve networking.md'de: 'POSTROUTING MASQUERADE for 10.0.1.0/24 through eth0' mevcut

expectations.text: Output includes rollback commands or iptables flush commands
expectations.evidence: networking.md'de rollback section ve script başında rollback komutları mevcut

expectations.text: Output warns about SSH connectivity before applying firewall rules
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: 'Applies iptables in SSH-safe order: ESTABLISHED/SSH ACCEPT before -P INPUT DROP' — SSH connection korunuyor
